Skills.title: Skills & Expertise
Skills.subtitle: Technical skills and professional capabilities details

techDescriptions.React: Modern frontend framework, excels at building interactive user interfaces with component-based development and virtual DOM optimization
techDescriptions.Vue: Progressive JavaScript framework, easy to learn and use, suitable for rapid single-page application development
techDescriptions.NextJS: Full-stack React framework providing SSR, SSG optimizations to enhance application performance
techDescriptions.HTML5: Modern web markup language, offering rich semantic tags and multimedia support
techDescriptions.CSS3: Stylesheet language supporting animations, responsive design, and modern layout techniques
techDescriptions.Vite: Fast frontend build tool providing hot reload and optimized development experience
techDescriptions.Tailwind: Utility-first CSS framework, rapidly building modern interfaces through atomic classes
techDescriptions.Magento: Enterprise-grade e-commerce platform, supporting large-scale online store development and management
techDescriptions.Catalyst: High-performance frontend framework focused on building fast-responsive user interfaces
techDescriptions.ES6: Modern version of JavaScript, providing arrow functions, modules, and other new features
techDescriptions.JavaScript: Dynamic programming language, core technology for frontend development
techDescriptions.TypeScript: JavaScript superset with type system, providing better development experience and code quality
techDescriptions.NodeJS: JavaScript runtime based on Chrome V8 engine, used for server-side development
techDescriptions.PostgreSQL: Powerful open-source relational database supporting complex queries and data integrity
techDescriptions.RESTful: REST architectural style API design, providing standardized web service interfaces
techDescriptions.GraphQL: Query language and runtime, providing flexible and efficient data query methods
techDescriptions.Git: Distributed version control system, managing code versions and team collaboration
techDescriptions.Docker: Containerization platform, simplifying application deployment and environment management
techDescriptions.VSCode: Lightweight code editor providing rich plugins and debugging features
techDescriptions.Cursor: AI-powered code editor, enhancing programming efficiency and code quality
techDescriptions.ChatGPT: AI assistant tool, assisting with code writing, problem solving, and knowledge acquisition
techDescriptions.Figma: Collaborative design tool for UI/UX design and prototyping
techDescriptions.SFSymbol: Apple system icon library, providing consistent icon design language

Policies.title: Policies
Policies.description: Learn about our terms of service, privacy policy, and security policy
Policies.termsSection1Content: This website provides technical blog content sharing services. Users can browse, read, and share technical articles through this website. We reserve the right to modify or terminate the service at any time.
Policies.termsSection2Content: When using this service, users must comply with relevant laws and regulations and must not publish illegal, harmful, threatening, defamatory, privacy-invading, or intellectual property-infringing information. Users are fully responsible for the content they publish.
Policies.termsSection3Content: The information provided on this website is for reference only and does not constitute any form of advice. We are not responsible for any losses incurred by users due to the use of information from this website.
Policies.privacySection1Content: We may collect basic information when you visit this website, including IP address, browser type, access time, etc. This information is only used to improve website performance and user experience.
Policies.privacySection2Content: The collected information will be used for analyzing website usage, optimizing content display, providing personalized services, and other purposes. We will not sell your personal information to third parties.
Policies.privacySection3Content: We adopt appropriate technical and administrative measures to protect your personal information security and prevent unauthorized access, use, or disclosure.
Policies.securitySection1Content: We use HTTPS encryption transmission, regular security updates, access control, and other security measures to protect website and user data security.
Policies.securitySection2Content: We regularly backup important data to ensure quick service recovery in case of unexpected situations and minimize data loss risks.
Policies.securitySection3Content: We continuously monitor website security status, promptly discover and handle potential security threats to ensure stable service operation.
Policies.contactDescription: If you have any questions or suggestions about these policies, please contact us through the website contact information.

DevelopmentHistory.sectionDescription: Complete development journey from blog 1.0 to 2.0, including detailed feature evolution of each version
DevelopmentHistory.blog1Description: Initial version, Vue3 + Vite pure static webpage, deployed on GitHub Pages
DevelopmentHistory.blog1DescriptionDetail: The initial version of the blog, built with Vue3 + Vite, deployed on GitHub Pages as a pure static webpage. Construction started in September 2023, officially launched in February 2024, and the first article was updated in March 2024.
DevelopmentHistory.blog1DomainNote: Original domain: http://carloss2035.com/, now inaccessible due to domain issues. This version has been discontinued.
DevelopmentHistory.blog2Description: Complete refactoring with Next.js + TypeScript modern architecture
DevelopmentHistory.blog2DescriptionDetail: Complete refactored version of the blog, built with Next.js + TypeScript + Contentlayer modern architecture. Construction started in September 2025, officially launched in October 2025, first article updated in October 2025, with ongoing maintenance and updates.
DevelopmentHistory.blog2ImprovementNote: Compared to version 1.0, achieved major improvements including tech stack upgrade, internationalization support, advanced SEO optimization, and significant performance improvements.

versions.v200Description: Complete migration from Vue3 to Next.js, refactoring the entire project with TypeScript and adopting modern tech stack and development patterns.
versions.v201Description: Blog officially launched, integrated Contentlayer content management system, MDX support, and published first article.
versions.v210Description: Enhanced multi-language support, implemented content display and switching experience for Chinese, English, and Japanese, supporting full-site internationalization.
versions.v215Description: Comprehensive mobile experience optimization, implementing responsive layout and adapting to various screen sizes, enhancing mobile user experience and interaction fluency.
versions.v220Description: Comprehensive SEO optimization, improving search engine rankings and website discoverability, continuous performance and user experience improvements.
versions.v230Description: Develop a rich website theme system, including dark theme and various color schemes, providing personalized visual experience options.
